title: Episode 1
overview: Noy will lose her virginity even if it is with someone who disgust everyone, Osher is forgotten by everyone he thought he was close with as Tzhubon comes to meet Hofit, Kino wants to see a volcano with Ra'anan on their way to Mirando Al Cielo.

title: Episode 2
overview: Advice from Elkana gives Noy confidence to be bold, Tzhubon will use any drug to be with Hofit, Kino and Ra'anan are on their journey.

title: Episode 3
overview: Osher's desire to sleep with the maid has met its limits, Tomeriko uses YouTube to broadcast the drug experiments between Hofit and Tzhubon and the Arab uncle of Masuli takes him off the streets.

title: Episode 4
overview: In a flashback, we go back one year, revealing what happened the night the lives of the protagonists changed at the "Titanic" club. When Ney, Mastoli, Tomariko, and Dudo do not gain entrance  and decide to have their own party outside.

title: Episode 5
overview: Hofit grows close with Tzhubon and immigration is called at the request of Osher. Noy is hospitalized as Kino is in the jungle of South America.

title: Episode 6
overview: Noy has contracted AIDS and appears at Elkana's door with drugs, Masuli's perversions are under investigation, Tzhubon has a crazy idea, and Kino finally reaches Dr. America.

title: Episode 7
overview: Elkana's escapes, Osher has taken up residence with a sex doll he calls Kim Logsi, Masuli stays at Shuki's for Shabbat, Kino and Ra'anan go down a dangerous path.

title: Episode 8
overview: Noy wants to leave the country in light of the troubling news, Ra'anan's fate is revisited and Tzhubon is once again fighting fear.

title: Episode 9
overview: Mirando Al Cielo is closer than expected, but before Kino and Ra'anan can go any further, they must settle some unfinished business. Tzhubon has decided it is time for Hofit to give him what he wants.

title: Episode 10
overview: Tomeriko escapes the country with his brother, but before he does, he decides to kidnap Yizar to get revenge. Hofit takes drastic measures to wake up Kino, and Noy takes this time to grow closer to Elkana.
